source.description: R-wave detections derived from the ECG channel of the Medicom MTD ECG and respiration recording.

processing: r_wave_times contains ECG R-wave occurrence times derived from the parent ECG signal.
r_wave_samples contains the corresponding sample positions on the parent ECG sample grid.
dtk is derived from successive r_wave_times and remains generic interval data.
The leading NaN in dtk preserves alignment between R-wave times and intervals.
Algorithms consuming dtk must apply their specified missing-value behavior.

source.description: Simultaneous ECG and respiration recording acquired with a Medicom MTD system. ECG was recorded with electrodes and respiration was recorded with a chest belt.

notes: The simultaneous respiration channel can support future scientific validation of ECG-derived respiration, such as comparing dominant respiratory frequencies between EDR and reference respiration.

source.description: Synthetic interval series containing a non-finite interval for hrv.tdmetrics invalid-value conformance.

processing: Contains a positive interval sequence with one Inf value.
The Inf value is invalid for hrv.tdmetrics and is retained to test rejection of non-finite intervals.

source.description: Small hand-calculated expected EDR outputs for ecg.sloperange conformance cases.

processing: positive_edr contains the analytical EDR sequence [5, 7, 6] for the small positive synthetic case.
boundary_edr contains [NaN, 7, NaN] to preserve alignment when the first and last R-wave windows are incomplete.
